calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-17-2006 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-13-2006 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Motion And Motion To Strike Portions Of Complaint
Off Calendar Oct-12-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Brian F. Kram, 507-0707, appearing for plaintiff and responding party
Steven H. Bovarnick of Hunter and Bovarnick, 621-8700, appearing for defendants and moving parties

This matter was not argued. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANTS SALEH HASSANEIN, FATEN HASSANEIN and AMERICANO, INC'S Motion To Strike Portions Of Complaint is granted as to the claim for attorneys fees, but otherwise denied. Prevailing party to prepare form of order. (301/PJB/PM) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR 8189

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-12-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Brian F. Kram, 507-0707, appearing for plaintiff and responding party
Steven H. Bovarnick of Hunter and Bovarnick, 621-8700, appearing for defendants and moving parties

This matter was not argued. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANTS SALEH HASSANEIN, FATEN HASSANEIN and AMERICANO, INC'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained with 5 days leave to amend to correct paragraphs 7 and 8, and inconsistencies in complaint. Prevailing party to prepare form of order. (301/PJB/PM) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR 8189
